prompts.text: Transform into a Renaissance oil painting with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting and rich deep colors
Convert to watercolor with soft flowing brushstrokes warm pastel tones and visible paper texture
Apply cinematic film noir aesthetic - high contrast black and white deep shadows 1940s mood
Transform into Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style with flat colors bold outlines and decorative patterns
Enhance lighting to golden hour - warm directional sunlight long shadows rich amber tones
Remove the background completely and replace with clean neutral studio gradient for product photography
Upscale and sharpen all details - enhance texture clarity and fine details without altering composition
Correct exposure and white balance professionally - lift shadows recover highlights perfect skin tones
Detailed professional analysis: composition lighting subject matter mood color palette and technical quality
Identify every object person and element visible. Describe spatial relationships scale and notable details
Analyze the complete color palette - dominant colors accent colors harmony type and suggest complementary palettes
Evaluate this image for marketing and commercial use - visual impact audience appeal strengths and improvements
Transform into a fantasy illustration - add magical elements ethereal lighting and otherworldly atmosphere
Cyberpunk version - neon lights rain reflections urban decay holographic overlays dystopian atmosphere
Vintage 1970s photograph aesthetic - film grain faded colors light leaks era-appropriate color grading
Transform into a detailed architectural technical drawing - blueprint style with annotations and measurements
Transform into a magical Christmas scene - add snow falling warm golden window light decorated Christmas tree festive wreaths and red ribbons
Apply a Halloween transformation - dark moody atmosphere orange and purple lighting carved pumpkins bats silhouetted against a full moon gothic fog
Transform into a vibrant Fourth of July celebration - add fireworks bursting in red white and blue American flags warm summer evening glow
Apply a Thanksgiving warmth aesthetic - golden harvest tones warm amber lighting autumn leaves in rich reds and oranges cozy and inviting atmosphere
Transform into a Valentine Day romantic scene - soft pink and red bokeh lighting rose petals hearts warm candlelight glow dreamy soft focus
Apply a Hanukkah transformation - warm golden candlelight from a menorah blue and silver tones Star of David peaceful warm evening atmosphere
Transform into a Diwali festival of lights scene - hundreds of glowing diyas oil lamps vibrant rangoli patterns warm golden and orange light festive and joyful
Apply a New Year Eve celebration aesthetic - champagne gold and silver tones confetti falling fireworks in the distance midnight countdown energy
Transform into a cozy winter holiday scene - snow covered landscape warm glowing cabin windows pine trees dusted with snow smoke rising from chimney
Apply St. Patrick Day festive transformation - vibrant greens shamrocks golden light rays rainbow in background cheerful and celebratory mood
Transform into an Easter spring scene - pastel colors blooming flowers soft morning light colorful Easter eggs hidden in lush green grass
Analyze this holiday image and describe all festive elements decorations mood lighting and cultural traditions represented
Transform this portrait into a festive birthday celebration photo - add colorful balloons in the background birthday banner confetti falling warm party lighting
Create a glamorous birthday party atmosphere - gold and rose gold balloons elegant floral arrangements sparkling bokeh lights champagne celebration mood
Transform into a kids birthday party scene - bright primary colors cartoon balloons streamers birthday cake with candles joyful and energetic atmosphere
Apply a milestone birthday transformation - elegant sophisticated atmosphere silver and gold accents milestone number prominently displayed celebratory but refined
Transform into a surprise party scene - dimly lit room transitioning to bright celebration confetti explosion balloons dropping joyful atmosphere
Apply a garden birthday party aesthetic - outdoor summer setting floral decorations pastel color palette fairy lights strung overhead elegant and cheerful
Transform into a tropical birthday celebration - vibrant tropical flowers flamingo and pineapple decorations bright sunny atmosphere beach party vibes
Apply a vintage birthday aesthetic - retro color grading old fashioned decorations film grain warm nostalgic tones timeless celebration feel
Transform into a luxury birthday celebration - high end venue crystal chandeliers white and gold color scheme elegant floral centerpieces black tie atmosphere
Create a photorealistic birthday cake design that reflects the personality style and interests shown in this image
Transform this image into a birthday greeting card design - add warm celebratory typography decorative borders balloons and confetti warm heartfelt mood
Analyze this celebration image - identify the occasion type decorations used color scheme mood estimated number of guests and venue style
Analyze this technical diagram - describe all components data flows architecture decisions and security implications
Extract and transcribe all visible text from this image into clean organized properly formatted markdown
This is a network or system diagram - identify all components connections protocols and potential vulnerabilities
